articles.title: Bitcoin teases $62K breakdown as analysis sees Micron earnings volatility next
articles.description: Bitcoin stayed volatile while bulls tried to preserve support at local lows while stocks prepared for Micron forward earnings and digested Asia losses.

articles.title: HaloBraid raises $7M from Seven Seven Six to end the six-hour hair salon appointment
articles.description: HaloBraid aims to help salons speed up braiding with its first device, slated to launch later this year, that acts a braiding assistant for professional stylists.

articles.title: 聯電 5 月 EPS 達 0.68 元，較 2025 年同期大增 195.7%
articles.description: 晶圓代工大廠聯電23日發布重大訊息表示，因有價證券於集中交易市場達公布注意交易資訊標準，依據台灣證券交易所通知 […]

articles.title: Vitalik Buterin says Ethereum Foundation will cut budget 40% in major reset
articles.description: The reduction comes on the same day the EF confirmed a 20% reduction in headcount and follows the resignation of co-Executive Director Hsiao-Wei Wang. Her departure brings the total number of senior Ethereum Foundation figures to leave since January to nine, underscoring the scale of the organizatio

articles.title: Bitcoin's recent drop below $60,000 signals Fed, ETF and AI pressures: Deutsche Bank
articles.description: Bitcoin's slump to its lowest level since late 2024 reflects a hawkish Federal Reserve, exchange-traded fund outflows and a shift of capital into AI, the bank said.

articles.title: Bitcoin slump worsens amid SpaceX rout: Can BTC price hold $60K any longer?
articles.description: SpaceX’s $600 billion wipeout rattles tech markets, putting Bitcoin’s $60,000 support at risk as traders brace for a deeper BTC selloff.

articles.title: 兩顆恆星先後爆炸竟是同一起源，天文學界首次確認「雙重超新星」雙星系統
articles.description: 天文學界近日發表了一組極為罕見的天體發現。來自加州史丹佛大學等機構的跨國研究團隊利用 NASA 費米伽瑪射線太 […]

articles.title: Why tokenized SpaceX shares broke before retail investors could buy them
articles.description: Tokenized SpaceX shares drew more than $1 billion in demand, but many investors received refunds instead. What went wrong?

articles.title: Meta debuts new, cheaper smart glasses under its own brand
articles.description: The smart glasses are available in several countries starting today in a variety of color and lens combinations.

articles.title: The SEC delayed tokenizing stocks, and here’s why that’s a relief
articles.description: Before we rush to tokenize U.S. equities, we need compliance systems that understand context, not just checkboxes. Investors like Michael Burry see the danger, so should the rest of us, urges Chamarajnagar.

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation cuts 20% of staff amid leadership exodus
articles.description: The reduction follows a period of significant upheaval at the organization’s leadership level.

articles.title: Bitcoin may need to plunge 15% or more to mark bottom, according to this long-time indicator
articles.description: With bitcoin testing its 200 week moving average, on-chain data suggests the $50,000 to $54,000 range could become the next key battleground.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Former Robinhood Crypto COO Tanya Denisova joins stablecoin issuer Agora as head of operations
articles.description: The former Robinhood Crypto executive will oversee operations as Agora scales its rapidly growing AUSD stablecoin business.

articles.title: In Clarity Act's final weeks, its path through U.S. Senate not getting much clearer
articles.description: Tough negotiations linger in several difficult arenas, but crypto's Washington lobbyists are flying in allies this week and still hoping for a July vote.

articles.title: Fika Jobs raises $4M to build a video-first hiring platform where AI agents interview candidates
articles.description: Stockholm-based startup Fika Jobs is building a video-first hiring platform that combines AI interview agents with short-form video profiles, creating something that feels like a cross between LinkedIn and TikTok.

articles.title: Kalshi adds India to growing list of restricted jurisdictions
articles.description: Kalshi has added India to its list of 55 restricted jurisdictions, months after Indian authorities warned VPN providers to stop facilitating access to these platforms.

articles.title: The ECB digital euro takes step forward after winning key European Parliament vote
articles.description: EU lawmakers backed a legal framework to develop an ECB digital currency by 2029 so the continent can stop relying entirely on U.S. credit card and stablecoin giants.

articles.title: Franklin Templeton closes 250 Digital acquisition deal and sets up new Franklin Crypto division
articles.description: The $1.7 trillion asset manager did not disclose the amount paid for the acquisition of 250 Digital but revealed its plans for a new corporate division exclusively for crypto investments.

articles.title: EU committee advances digital euro bill after key vote
articles.description: EU lawmakers backed rules for an offline and online digital euro, with privacy safeguards, holding limits and no interest payments.
